referenceObject.reference: Nicoletta, M., Panchuk, J., Peralta-Seen, N. & Ferretti, N. (2022c). Description and sexual behavior of two new species of mygalomorph spiders (Araneae: Theraphosidae, Pycnothelidae), and first record of Xenonemesia platensis (Pycnothelidae) of Corrientes, Argentina.
